tagline: We Don't Just Build Pools. We Build Memories.

hero.headline: Three Generations of Pool Perfection
hero.subheadline: Since 1963, the Gritz family has been building Chester County's finest pools with zero subcontractors. Owner Mark personally oversees every project from first shovel to final splash.
checkmarks: Serving Chester County, Berks County & beyond

services.headline: Everything Your Pool & Spa Needs
services.subtitle: From new construction to weekly maintenance, we handle it all — so you never have to call anyone else.

cards.title: Custom Pool Construction
cards.description: Vinyl liner and fiberglass inground pools built from scratch. Mark oversees every dig, every pour, every finish — no subcontractors, no shortcuts.

cards.title: Pool Service & Maintenance
cards.description: Keep your water crystal clear with regular cleanings, chemical balancing, and equipment checks from our experienced service technicians.

cards.title: Vinyl Liner Replacement
cards.description: Faded, wrinkled, or leaking liner? We measure, order, and install your new liner so your pool looks brand new again.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Upgrades
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, salt systems — we diagnose and fix pool equipment fast so you spend less time waiting and more time swimming.

cards.title: Hot Tubs & Spas
cards.description: Authorized dealer of Nordic and Aspen Spas. Visit our showroom to find the perfect hot tub for relaxation year-round.

cards.title: Pool Openings & Closings
cards.description: Seasonal prep done right. We open your pool for summer and winterize it properly so you never worry about freeze damage.

steps.title: Free Consultation
steps.description: Mark visits your property, discusses your vision, and designs a pool that fits your yard and your budget — no pressure, no gimmicks.

steps.title: Owner-Supervised Build
steps.description: Our crew handles every phase of construction with Mark on-site. No subcontractors means consistent quality from start to finish.

steps.title: Dive In & Enjoy
steps.description: Your pool is complete, inspected, and ready for years of family memories. Plus, our service team is always a phone call away.

about.label: About Gritz Pools & Spas
about.headline: A Family Legacy Built on Quality Since 1963
about.description: When Henry Gritz started building pools in 1963, he set a simple standard: do quality work, use no subcontractors, and treat every customer like a neighbor. Today, his son Mark carries that same philosophy into every project. Three generations later, we're still a family business that believes your pool should be built by people who take personal pride in the finished product — not a revolving door of hired-out crews.

features.title: Owner-Supervised Construction
features.description: Mark personally oversees every project from excavation to final inspection — no subcontractors, no middlemen.

features.title: Authorized Equipment Dealer
features.description: We carry Hayward pool equipment, Nordic Spas, and Aspen Spas — factory-backed brands you can trust.

features.title: Full Retail Supply Store
features.description: Visit our Coatesville showroom for chemicals, accessories, covers, outdoor furniture, and everything your pool needs.

pricing.headline: Quality Construction That Fits Your Budget
pricing.subtitle: Every pool is different, so we quote every project individually. No cookie-cutter pricing, no hidden fees — just honest numbers from a family that's been doing this for 63 years.

guarantee.headline: The Gritz Family Promise
guarantee.description: For over six decades, our name has been on every pool we build. That means we stand behind our work — not because of a contract, but because our reputation in Chester County depends on it. If something isn't right, call Mark directly. We'll make it right.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build a new inground pool?
faqs.answer: Most inground pool projects take 4 to 8 weeks depending on the design, permits, and weather. Mark will give you a realistic timeline during your free consultation so there are no surprises.

faqs.question: Why don't you use subcontractors?
faqs.answer: Because quality matters. When our own crew handles every phase — excavation, plumbing, electrical, finishing — we control the outcome from start to finish. That's how the Gritz family has done it since 1963.

faqs.question: Do you service pools you didn't build?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our service team handles maintenance, repairs, openings, closings, and equipment work on any pool — whether we built it or not.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Chester County, Berks County, West Chester, Oxford, Reading, Lancaster, Coatesville, and surrounding communities in southeastern Pennsylvania.

faqs.question: Do you sell hot tubs?
faqs.answer: Yes. We're an authorized dealer for Nordic Spas and Aspen Spas. Visit our showroom in Coatesville to see models in person and find the right fit for your home.

testimonials.name: Kristine D.
testimonials.text: Back in 2005ish, we had Gritz install our 1st pool. Then around 2012, we needed a new liner due to a puncture from a branch. In 2018 they installed our 2nd pool at our new home. Each time we worked with Mark, Robert, and the rest of the crew was a positive experience. The final project was definitely worth the wait!! I would definitely recommend them.
testimonials.context: Customer since 2005 — 2 pool installations + liner replacement

testimonials.name: Stephen M.
testimonials.text: As a contractor myself, I really appreciated their no non-sense approach. They knew exactly what needed to be done and how long it would take. And did exactly what they said. Mark and the guys are very knowledgeable and hard-working people. We love the pool and look forward to enjoying it for years to come.

testimonials.name: Kay R.
testimonials.text: We put a Gritz pool in, in 1976. It was the best investment we ever made!! The company was then owned and run by Henry Gritz, the present owner's father — a true genius who even designed and built his own filters. Our experience with Gritz has been always been positive. I would recommend Gritz Pools to anyone.

contact.headline: Let's Talk About Your Pool
contact.subtitle: Whether you're dreaming of a new build or need service on your existing pool, the Gritz family is ready to help.
benefits: Free, no-pressure consultation with owner Mark
Same-family ownership for 63 years — we're not going anywhere
One call covers construction, service, repairs & supplies

footer.description: Gritz Pools & Spas has been the trusted name in pool construction, service, and hot tubs across southeastern Pennsylvania since 1963. Three generations of quality craftsmanship.
footer.service_area: Serving Chester County, Berks County, West Chester, Oxford, Reading, Lancaster & Coatesville, PA
footer.copyright: Gritz Pools & Spas. All rights reserved.
